page_content:
REQUIREMENTS Requirements for the Classics major include the College of Arts and Humanities requirement of 39 3xx- or 4xx-level credits completed.

The College’s Global Engagement Requirement will be automatically fulﬁlled in the process of taking language courses in the Latin or Latin and Greek tracks of the major.

No course grade below the grade of "C-" may count toward the major. An overall GPA of 2.0 in the major is required for graduation.
